name: AXA S.A. Act.Nom. (Sp. ADRs) 1/
summary: AXA S.A. Act.Nom. (Sp. ADRs) 1/ refers to the American Depositary Receipt (ADR) of AXA S.A., a multinational insurance company headquartered in Paris, France. The ADR represents ownership of a certain number of AXA shares held by a depositary bank. AXA provides insurance, investment management, and other financial services globally.
